name: ABC Dry Powder Extinguisher 4KG
title: ABC DRY
POWDER
EXTINGUISHER
4KG
desc: India's most trusted multi-purpose fire extinguisher. ISI marked under IS:2171, this 4KG dry powder unit tackles Class A (solid), Class B (liquid), and Class C (gas) fires. Engineered for commercial establishments, warehouses, factories, and residential premises.
features: Multi-purpose ABC powder - effective against Class A (wood/paper/cloth), B (flammable liquids), and C (gas) fires
ISI marked under IS:2171, ensuring compliance with Indian fire safety standards
Pressurized with dry nitrogen for a consistent discharge without performance drop-off
Easy-to-use squeeze-grip valve with safety pin and tamper-evident seal
Powder discharge range of 4-6 meters for a safe standoff distance
Lightweight body with hang bracket included for wall mounting
Annual service due indicator and pressure gauge for quick visual check
certNote: This extinguisher carries the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) ISI mark under IS:2171 - the mandatory certification for portable fire extinguishers in India. Suitable for installations requiring TAC (Tariff Advisory Committee) approval and NBC (National Building Code of India) compliance.

name: CO₂ Fire Extinguisher 4.5KG
title: CO2
CARBON
DIOXIDE
4.5KG
desc: The go-to extinguisher for electrical hazards - carbon dioxide leaves zero residue, making it the safest choice for server rooms, data centers, electrical panels, laboratories, and precision equipment areas. Operates by smothering fires with CO₂, displacing oxygen without damaging sensitive electronics.
features: Zero residue discharge - CO₂ evaporates completely, leaving no mess or corrosion on sensitive equipment
Safe on live electrical fires up to 1000V - the only recommended extinguisher for Class E (electrical) fires
ISI marked under IS:2878 - mandatory standard for CO₂ extinguishers in India
Black horn with anti-static discharge prevents static build-up near sensitive electronics
High-pressure steel cylinder with brass valve, pressure gauge, and safety burst disc
CO₂ acts by oxygen displacement - smothers fire without chemical contamination
Ideal for server rooms, UPS rooms, control rooms, laboratories, and switch rooms
specTable: When weight loss >10% or after use
certNote: Certified under IS:2878 by the Bureau of Indian Standards. The CO₂ extinguisher is the recommended type for Class E (electrical) fires in India per NBC 2016 guidelines and is TAC approved for insurance purposes.

name: Clean Agent (HFC-236fa) 4KG
title: CLEAN
AGENT
HFC-236fa
4KG
desc: The most advanced portable fire suppression agent available. HFC-236fa (hexafluoropropane) extinguishes fires by chemically interrupting the combustion chain reaction - leaving absolutely zero residue. Designed for data centers, server rooms, telecom racks, and any environment where equipment survival after a fire event is non-negotiable.
features: HFC-236fa extinguishes by chemically interrupting the combustion chain reaction - more effective per kilogram than CO₂
Leaves absolutely zero residue - equipment can be powered back on immediately after discharge
Safe for Class A, B, C, and E fires - the only portable extinguisher to cover all four classes
Electrically non-conductive and safe on live equipment up to 35,000V
Non-corrosive and non-abrasive - no secondary damage to sensitive electronics, optics, or instruments
NFPA 2001 and ISO 14520 compliant agent - the global standard for clean agent fire suppression
Stored as a liquid, discharged as a gas - no freeze risk, no residual liquid after use
specTable: When weight loss >5% or after use
certNote: HFC-236fa is certified under IS:15683 and complies with NFPA 2001 (Standard on Clean Agent Fire Extinguishing Systems) and ISO 14520. Zero ozone depletion potential. Note: Due to high GWP, regulations around HFCs are evolving - confirm compliance with local fire authority before procurement.

name: Fire Hydrant Valve (Gun Metal) 63mm
title: FIRE HYDRANT
VALVE
GUN METAL
63MM
desc: Heavy-duty gunmetal landing valve - the critical connection point in every fire hydrant system. Engineered for high-pressure firefighting water supply, IS:5290 certified, with a smooth quarter-turn operation for rapid deployment. Used in buildings, factories, warehouses, and public infrastructure across India.
features: Cast from IS grade gunmetal (Cu-Sn-Zn alloy) - corrosion-resistant, high-strength, long service life in wet environments
IS:5290 certified - mandatory standard for all landing valves used in fire hydrant systems in India
63mm bore for high-flow firefighting water delivery - compatible with standard fire brigade hoses
Quarter-turn ball mechanism for instant open/close - critical for rapid response in emergencies
Integral pressure-test port for system commissioning and maintenance checks
Blanking cap included with chain to prevent debris entry when not in use
Available in single-headed and double-headed (Siamese) configurations
certNote: IS:5290 is the Bureau of Indian Standards specification for landing valves used in fire hydrant systems. Mandatory for all commercial and industrial buildings under NBC 2016. TAC approval required for fire insurance compliance.

name: Fire Hose Reel - 30M × 25mm
title: FIRE HOSE
REEL
30M × 25MM
desc: Wall-mounted fire hose reel with 30 metres of semi-rigid hose and full 180° swivel arm for maximum coverage. IS:884 compliant for use in all NBC-regulated buildings. Ideal for first-response firefighting in commercial complexes, schools, hospitals, and high-rise buildings.
features: 30-metre semi-rigid hose provides excellent reach for large floor areas without kinking
180° full-swing swivel arm bracket allows complete coverage of corridor and rooms on both sides
IS:884 compliant - the mandatory Indian standard for fire hose reels
Pistol-grip nozzle with shut-off and jet/spray selector for versatile attack
Red powder-coated mild steel drum and mounting bracket for corrosion resistance
25mm bore hose provides higher flow rate compared to standard 19mm reels
Quick-connect 25mm BSP water inlet for easy installation to hydrant system
Suitable for first-aid firefighting without requiring fire brigade presence
certNote: Manufactured to IS:884 as published by Bureau of Indian Standards, this hose reel is compliant with the National Building Code of India. Required in all buildings where hydrant systems are mandated under NBC Part 4 (Fire and Life Safety).

name: Photoelectric Smoke Detector
title: PHOTO
ELECTRIC
SMOKE
DETECTOR
desc: Advanced optical smoke detector using photoelectric light-scatter technology. Provides 360° omnidirectional coverage with built-in drift compensation to eliminate nuisance alarms. IS:11360 certified and compatible with all conventional fire alarm control panels.
features: Photoelectric (optical scatter) sensing - detects slow smouldering fires earlier than ionisation type detectors
360° omnidirectional chamber allows smoke entry from any direction - eliminates blind spots
Built-in microprocessor drift compensation reduces nuisance alarms from dust accumulation
Wide 9-35V DC operating range - compatible with all conventional fire alarm panels without additional hardware
Bi-colour LED: slow green flash (normal), rapid red flash (alarm), steady amber (fault)
Universal 45mm twist-lock base - direct retrofit into existing detector base sockets
IS:11360 certified and IP44 rated for dust and splash protection
certNote: Certified to IS:11360 under Bureau of Indian Standards. IP44 rated for dust and splash protection. Meets NBC Part 4 (Fire & Life Safety) requirements for smoke detection in commercial and residential occupancies.

name: Conventional Fire Alarm Panel 4-Zone
title: FIRE ALARM
PANEL
4-ZONE
desc: 4-zone conventional fire alarm control panel with backlit 16×2 LCD display and 100-event log memory. 230V AC powered with 24-hour sealed lead-acid battery backup. IS:2189 compliant. Central control hub for detector zones, sounders, and relay outputs.
features: 4 fully independent detection zones with individual alarm, fault, and isolate controls per zone
Backlit 16×2 LCD displays zone status, time, date, and event messages in plain English - no cryptic codes
100-event log memory with full timestamp - essential for fire investigation and insurance documentation
IS:2189 compliant: 24-hour standby + 30-minute alarm battery backup built in
Built-in sounder circuit plus volt-free relay output for external devices and BMS integration
Automatic open-circuit and short-circuit fault detection on every zone
Isolate any faulty zone independently - system stays active while one zone is under service
certNote: Certified to IS:2189 (Code of Practice for Fire Detection and Alarm Systems) under Bureau of Indian Standards. Battery backup meets minimum IS:2189 standby duration requirements. Suitable for all commercial, industrial, and residential occupancies under NBC Part 4.

name: Automatic Water Sprinkler Head (68°C)
title: AUTO WATER
SPRINKLER
HEAD 68°C
desc: Pendant-type fusible-link automatic sprinkler head that activates at precisely 68°C. IS:903 and EN:12259 compliant. K=80 flow factor for light and ordinary hazard occupancies. Factory hydrostatic tested at 35 bar. The essential backbone of every automatic sprinkler system.
features: Fusible-link activates at exactly 68°C - only the heads directly above the fire discharge, not the whole system
Pendant deflector creates full cone spray pattern for complete floor coverage from ceiling mount
K=80 factor delivers correct flow-to-pressure balance for light and ordinary hazard occupancies per NBC
IS:903 and EN:12259 compliant - accepted by all fire departments, insurers, and NBC compliance auditors
Precision CNC-machined brass body and frame arms for consistent long-term corrosion resistance
Every unit factory hydrostatic tested at 3.5 MPa (35 bar) before packaging
Red bulb (68°C) - colour coded for immediate identification and correct replacement
certNote: Certified to IS:903 under Bureau of Indian Standards. Also meets European EN:12259 standard. Mandatory for all automatic sprinkler systems under NBC 2016 Part 4. Accepted by all Indian fire departments, insurance underwriters, and TAC for NOC compliance.

name: Firefighter Proximity Suit
title: FIREFIGHTER
PROXIMITY
SUIT
desc: Aluminized multi-layer proximity suit rated for radiant heat up to 1000°C. EN 1486 and IS:15652 certified. Full-coverage design with integrated aluminized hood, gold-coated polycarbonate visor, PTFE moisture barrier, and removable washable comfort liner. Required equipment for airport ARFF, refinery, and industrial brigade operations.
features: Multi-layer aluminized glass-fabric outer shell reflects up to 95% of incident radiant heat
EN 1486 certified - global benchmark for proximity firefighting suits, required at licensed airports
Integrated aluminized hood with gold-coated polycarbonate visor - no SCBA interface gaps
PTFE inner moisture barrier prevents steam burn injury when working near water spray operations
Removable aramid/viscose comfort liner - machine washable at 60°C, air dry only
Available in S/M/L/XL/XXL with pre-shaped knee and elbow panels for unrestricted movement
Includes aluminized gauntlet gloves and overboots as complete protective ensemble
certNote: Certified to EN 1486 (European standard for proximity firefighting suits) and IS:15652. CE marked. Approved for aircraft rescue and firefighting (ARFF) operations at licensed airports. Meets DGCA requirements for airport emergency response teams in India.

name: SCBA Self Contained Breathing Apparatus
title: SCBA
BREATHING
APPARATUS
desc: Full-face positive-pressure SCBA with 6L carbon composite cylinder at 300 bar. Provides 30 minutes air at working rate. Lung-governed demand valve with bypass. Electronic HUD pressure display with audible low-pressure alarm. CE EN:137 certified. Prevents ingress of toxic gases even in the most extreme smoke and chemical environments.
features: Positive pressure inside mask at all times - prevents toxic gas ingress even if facial seal is momentarily broken
6L carbon composite cylinder at 300 bar - ultra-lightweight versus steel alternative
Panoramic full-face mask with speech diaphragm for radio communication without mask removal
Lung-governed demand valve minimises air consumption - bypass valve for emergency continuous flow
Electronic heads-up display (HUD) shows pressure continuously; audible + visual alarm at 75 bar (25% reserve)
CE certified to EN:137 - the international standard for open-circuit firefighting SCBA
Adjustable aluminium frame harness with quick-release buckles for rapid donning under 60 seconds
certNote: CE certified to EN:137 (open-circuit self-contained breathing apparatus for firefighting). Also compliant with IS:10245. Must be used with Grade E (breathing quality) compressed air only per IS:10245. Accepted by SISI, industrial safety authorities, and insurance underwriters.

name: Glow-in-Dark Fire Exit Sign (Pack of 10)
title: GLOW-IN-DARK
FIRE EXIT
SIGN ×10
desc: Photoluminescent fire exit signs with strontium aluminate pigment for 8+ hour glow after power failure. IS:12349 and ISO:3864 compliant. Pack of 10 with mixed directional arrows covers a standard floor. Zero power, zero wiring, zero batteries - charges automatically from ambient light.
features: Strontium aluminate photoluminescent pigment - 8+ hour glow at 180 mcd/m² after 30-minute ambient charge
IS:12349 and ISO:3864 compliant - mandatory for NOC and building completion certificate
Zero power required - no electrical connection, no batteries, no wiring cost
Dual fixing: high-bond 3M self-adhesive backing + pre-drilled screw holes
UV-resistant hard laminate overlay - 10+ year rated lifespan against fading and cleaning chemicals
Pack of 10 includes mixed running man left, right, and forward arrow directions
Rigid 1.5mm PVC substrate - maintains flat profile even in humid environments
certNote: Compliant with IS:12349 (photoluminescent safety signs) and ISO:3864 (graphical symbols and safety signs). Mandatory under NBC Part 4 and accepted by all state fire departments for NOC compliance. No electrical hazard - safe for all occupancies.

name: Water Mist Extinguisher 9L
title: WATER MIST
EXTINGUISHER
9 LITRES
desc: Superheated water mist technology in a 9L stainless steel cylinder. Rated for Class A, B, and F fires. Electrically safe to 1000V (dielectric tested to 35kV). Zero chemical agent - pure deionised water. The definitive choice for commercial kitchens, hospitals, food facilities, and green buildings.
features: Superheated water mist cools fire, displaces oxygen, and creates steam blanket to prevent re-ignition - triple action
Class F rated - the only acceptable type for commercial kitchen cooking oil and fat fires
Dielectric tested to 35,000V - rated safe on live electrical equipment up to 1000V AC
Pure deionised water agent - zero chemical residue, safe in food production, operating theatres, and cleanrooms
Stainless steel 304 grade cylinder - corrosion-free for kitchen and high-humidity environments
9L capacity gives 60-90 seconds discharge - longer than standard 6L for sustained deep-seated fire attack
Zero ODP, zero GWP - the most environmentally responsible extinguisher type available
certNote: Certified to IS:15683 under BIS and CE marked to EN:3. Class F kitchen fire rating is verified by independent test. Dielectric test certified safe to 1000V by accredited laboratory. Mandatory for all professional kitchen fire safety compliance in India.

HELMET
